articles.title: Kodak EC35 is a dirt-cheap point-and-shoot film camera
articles.summary:
I’m partial to that avocado green one. | Image: Reto Project	

Following the success of its $99 Kodak-branded Snapic A1, Reto Project is releasing the Kodak EC35, an even more affordable 35mm film camera for just $34.99. The EC35 certainly isn't fancy. articles.title: ⚙️ How This Site Runs 100% Free Forever
